author: Federal Reserve
content: The Federal Open Market Committee today decided to maintain the target range for the federal funds rate at 5-1/4 to 5-1/2 percent. #Fed #Economy

author: Jerome Powell Fan
content: Rates stay high! The market didn't like that statement one bit. SPY dropping fast. #Fed #StockMarket

author: Crypto Whale
content: Massive inflow into Spot Bitcoin ETFs today. The institutional adoption is accelerating faster than expected. #Bitcoin #Crypto

author: Macro Economist
content: Latest CPI data shows inflation is stickier than the market hoped. Don't expect rate cuts before September now. #Economy #Inflation

author: Tech Investor
content: AI productivity gains are masking the underlying weakness in the broader economy. Look under the hood. #Economy

author: Bitcoin Archive
content: Bitcoin breaks $70k again! The halving supply shock is real. 🚀 #Bitcoin
